input.request: Audit the UI/UX design coherence, app icon ImageGen handoff, animation blueprint, haptics, and genre-aware visual DNA for this iOS utility app.
Turn these report-quality questions into a spec-driven ShipGuard plan with constitution, feature spec, tasks.md, analysis gates, and Devspace guardrails before Codex implements anything.

Use Spec Kit, CodexPro, Expo, Design Motion Principles, and X posts as read-only inputs, audit them before claiming they are natively integrated into ShipGuard, and convert useful observations into ShipGuard fixtures or report-quality questions.

Use ShipGuard as the front door for LaunchDeck: build and run the iOS app with XcodeBuildMCP, debug a launch issue, show a live simulator browser preview, try SwiftUI preview hot reload, and choose a profiler route without pretending the CLI executed those tools.
